prose_curation.scope: No public prose imported for Transit Books; factual catalog metadata only from official catalog PDFs.

provider_permissions.permission_basis: Official Transit Books pages and catalog PDFs expose public catalog facts; this fixture records no covers and disallows local cover caching until explicit cache permission is documented.
provider_permissions.takedown_contact: Use the Transit Books rights/about paths for permission, correction, or takedown requests: https://www.transitbooks.org/rights and https://www.transitbooks.org/about.
provider_permissions.not_legal_advice: This provider source policy is an engineering provenance control and is not legal advice.
